prompt: Migrate RefCashFlowFragment from DataBinding to ViewBinding + StateFlow

Error display logic (ObservableError → ErrorState) handled via extension function or inline, not left as TODO
All binding expressions from original XML are handled in Fragment code (none dropped silently)
